ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-04-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. appearing for the plaintiff. The Court is notified that the case has settled. The case is scheduled for an Order To Show Cause re: Dismissal pursuant to CRC 3.1385 on FEB-04-2020 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: NEWTON LAM; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
